description: Two specs/ subdirectories share the chunk-ID prefix 026- (validators-builtins and supervisor-orchestration). Per IMPLEMENTATION-PLAN.md actuals, SDD-26 is the validators chunk and SDD-24 is the orchestration chunk — the orchestration directory was misnamed during /speckit-specify.
disposition_ref: renamed specs/026-supervisor-orchestration/ to specs/024-supervisor-orchestration/ via git mv (T046)

description: SDD-25 row in playbook status table reports chunk 1 only (Scenario 14 green), but recent commits landed scenarios 11a/11b/12 (sentinels 12-14) in chunk 2. Status text is stale.
Build badge URL points at non-existent workflow .github/workflows/release-gates.yml; actual orchestrator workflow is fortress.yml.
Tech stack lists go-bitcoin v2 as the secp256k1/BIP32/ECIES dependency, but go.mod uses decred/dcrd/dcrec/secp256k1/v4 + decred/dcrd/hdkeychain/v3.
disposition_ref: rewrote tech-stack entry to name decred/dcrd/* (T027)

description: Tech stack lists sigil as a dependency, but sigil is not in go.mod — SecureBytes is custom-implemented in internal/vault/securebytes/. Sigil is referenced only as inspiration.
disposition_ref: removed sigil from tech-stack list; reframed as inspiration prose (T027)

description: Missing §Quick start section required by FR-010; README has no operator-actionable first-steps path.
Spec-Kit listed in tech-stack section as a hard dependency; it is a methodology/toolchain artefact not a runtime/build dep.
disposition_ref: moved Spec-Kit reference out of tech-stack (T027)

description: ErrChainLocked is exported (used internally with %w wrapping so callers can errors.Is) but not listed in docs/PACKAGE-MAP.md exported-API section for internal/audit.
disposition_ref: added entry to PACKAGE-MAP.md Symbol manifest (T034) — keep symbol; deletion would break errors.Is downstream

description: ErrInvalidIssuer is exported (returned by validate.go for callers to errors.Is) but not listed in docs/PACKAGE-MAP.md exported-API section for internal/token.
disposition_ref: added entry to PACKAGE-MAP.md Symbol manifest (T034) — keep symbol; deletion would break errors.Is downstream

description: Component table mentions 8 packages (server, vault, keys, token, transport, discord, cli, supervise); 11 real internal packages unmentioned (audit, config, keychain, logging, supervise/config, supervise/validators, supervise/watchdog, testutil, vault/securebytes, discord/alerts). Document defers to PACKAGE-MAP.md for exhaustive listing per existing footer.
Description claims component includes validators+watchdog, but supervise does not import supervise/validators (validators is a peer); supervise/watchdog imports supervise (reverse direction).
disposition_ref: clarified description to name peer packages (T042)

description: Notation suggests audit is internal to discord (internal/discord/audit.go); audit is a separate top-level package imported by cli, server, supervise. Misleading grouping with Discord responsibilities.
disposition_ref: clarified description to point at internal/audit (T042)

description: Description says audit channel posting implying discord→audit dependency; actual graph is audit→discord (audit imports discord via DiscordMirror seam).
Drift-detection script does not exist on as-shipped tree; required by FR-013.

Integration scenarios 01-10, 13, 15 fail loudly via scenarioPendingHarness sentinel — designed-in red per SDD-25 incremental-landing pattern (FR-001 forbids t.Skip). Pre-existing red baseline; not a regression introduced by SDD-33. SDD-25 in-progress per playbook.

Constitution security-critical-packages fenced block (constitution.md lines 253-261) byte-equal-matches compute.go securityCriticalPackages slice (FR-016 anchor). T024 K14 Principle VIII check PASS — no drift to record; finding kept as a verification receipt.
disposition_ref: verification receipt only — no edit required
